title: 8 Bit Will's Simplistic Bedwars
body:
**This resource pack is great for Bedwars and simialar PvP gamemodes, it has good-looking simplified graphics, short swords, and some retextured blocks!**
- Simplified graphics for less fuss.
- Wool is designed to make breezily bridge, god bridge, fruitberries bridge etc. easier by adding spots to aim at.
- Shorter swords allow better visibility while holding a sword and block-hitting.

- _**NOTE: 1.21.8 is a bit broken with some textures not displaying properly, I will either work on a fix or abort it.**_
- _** 1.21.11 has weird wood with some oak planks textured and some not.**_
